meaning: n.雅典人adj.雅典的,雅典人的
examples: Based on records from ancient Athens, each year young Athenian women collaborated to weave a new woolen robe that they used to dress a statue of the goddess Athena.
They grow up like the Athenian does, right smack in the middle of a plain, which is a good place for farming, with a great high acropolis available.
The Athenian Metropolitan Authority studied satellite imagery of the metropolis and found almost 17, 000 privately-owned pools!
Now that planet-wide network of interlinked computers became a court of the people - virtual Athenian democracy.
